literature_expectation.expected_transport_trend: Families with alternate paths should resist damage better than bottlenecked families, but target arrival and spreading need not rank the same way.
literature_expectation.expected_role_of_disorder: Stronger disorder should lower arrival and reveal whether a family is structurally robust or fragile.
literature_expectation.expected_role_of_phase_scrambling: Moderate phase scrambling may help only in families where coherent geometry creates harmful path competition.
literature_expectation.expected_failure_mode: A family that only spreads more but does not improve useful arrival should not be called better transport.
